turns.user_message: I went to a concert last weekend and it just felt dull. I can't believe it didn't excite me at all.
Now everything feels like that concert, just flat and pointless. I keep trying but nothing sparks anything inside.
I'm starting to think I might never feel anything again. My whole world has become this silent, empty space.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment. This just started recently.
